During the [[Stenax Massacres]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Stenax]] [[Species/Legends|species]] '''invaded''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tandankin]], wresting control of the world from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as they did to many worlds throughout the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]].
